'''Cinnagar weave armor''' was an extremely durable [[Armor/Legends|armor]] suit created during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]. A highly complex organic weave allowed the suit to withstand temperature extremes. Similar armor helped the people of [[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]] defend their [[City/Legends|city]] and their [[Empress Teta/Legends|planet]] against the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] led by [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]]. The armor suit continued to see use through the [[Jedi Civil War]].
